title: Misri Family Tree

compiled_from_original_images.description: Master overview centered on Shankar Joo Misri
Dhamodar Misri page 1 and Sad Lakshmi daughters
Sad Lakshmi W/O Dhamodar Misri sons
Shyam Lal Misri and Dina Nath Misri branches
Jagar Nath Misri and Gobind Joo Misri branches
Second copy of Jagar Nath Misri and Gobind Joo Misri branches
Handwritten ancestry overview, left and middle
Handwritten ancestry overview, middle and right

confidence_scale.high: Clearly printed or confirmed by another sheet
confidence_scale.medium: Readable, but the line placement or exact relationship has some ambiguity
confidence_scale.low: Handwritten, crossed out, cut off, or relationship line is hard to follow

transcription_policy: I preserved the spelling as written where it was readable.
I used question marks only inside notes or confidence fields, not as invented family members.
Where the source gives only a count, the JSON stores a count instead of fabricating names.
Where the sheet placement is unclear, the record is retained with confidence low and a note.

location_as_written.text: Misri's Zaindar Mohalla, Habakadal, Srinagar, Kashmir, House No. 7
Regni Devi / Ishta Devi, Tul-e-mulla, Srinagar, Kashmir
location_as_written.notes: The handwritten name is difficult to read. It appears as Regni Devi in one line and Ishta Devi in another.

children.name: Jia Lal

main_tree.name: Shankar Joo Misri
notes: 43740 marks first marriage as Bedni Tezi and second marriage as Heer. The exact mother for every child is not fully explicit, but the printed layout places Sonamali through Batni under the first-marriage line and Tulsi Vali under the second-marriage line.

known_uncertain_or_ambiguous_items.item: Some early ancestry lines from the handwritten pages
known_uncertain_or_ambiguous_items.reason: Multiple names are cut off or hard to read. I kept them in early_ancestry_notes rather than forcing exact parent-child links.
The Janki, Prithvi Nath, Gunwato Raina, and Koul's of Chhabal relationships are readable but the exact spouse/parent line is visually ambiguous.
Sheila ji / Bibi Lala, Dawarka Nath Lal, and Bal Krishen Kaul are written close together with crossed lines.
Nancy's spouse surname and child names are not legible, only one son and one daughter are indicated.

known_uncertain_or_ambiguous_items.item: Dina Nath Misri and Madsudan Misri
known_uncertain_or_ambiguous_items.reason: Dedicated sheets give their descendants clearly, but not their exact parent connection to the Shankar Joo master tree.

known_uncertain_or_ambiguous_items.item: Shyam Lal Misri extra handwritten names
known_uncertain_or_ambiguous_items.reason: Several handwritten names are present on the left side but not reliably tied to a printed branch.
